query:
SELECT DISTINCT
                            substr(
                                substr(lb.file_path, length(?2) + 2),
                                1,
                                instr(substr(lb.file_path, length(?2) + 2), '/') - 1
                            ) AS "child!: String"
                        FROM library_books lb
                        WHERE lb.library_id = ?1
                          AND lb.file_path LIKE (?2 || '/%/%')
